craigslist.title: Relaxing garden-style 680 sq ft 1 bed 1 bath - Hunt Club Apartments
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Hunt Club Apartments Featured Floorplan: 1-bed / 1-bath / 680 sq ft Monthly Price: $2021 - $2260 *Optional and usage-based charges not included. Contact office to confirm pricing details and included fees. Deposit: Call Call our office at show contact info Description: Exceptional Apartment Living! Hunt Club Apartments offers unique one bedroom, two bedroom, and three bedroom apartment homes in a beautiful setting that combines the comfort of home with exceptional resident services and outstanding community amenities. Options like fireplaces and storage spaces help you choose one of the apartment homes and create a style that is perfect for you. You will enjoy the convenience of living just minutes from major highways (Routes 63, 309, 202, & the PA Turnpike) and having easy access to transportation, employers, fine dining, parks and recreational areas, cultural events, historic attractions and shopping! By living luxuriously with a maintenance free lifestyle, you will find the serenity and convenience of Hunt Club Apartments to be your refreshing paradise. Schedule a tour of our beautiful North Wales apartments today and see why residents love coming home to Hunt Club. 1 bd, 1 ba, 680 Sq. Ft. 1 bd, 1 ba | Available 7/27/26 Chesterfield Floorplan, 1st Floor VP w/ View Online application: www.lease-apts.com?n=hunt_club&rp=eE4yDDTVvwi5&t=ap Amenities View Rental Terms Rent: $2,021 - $2,260 Application Fee: $60 Available 7/27/26 Pet Policy Cats allowed Dogs allowed Lease Terms: 3-Month, 4-Month, 5-Month, 6-Month, 7-Month, 8-Month, 9-Month, 10-Month, 11-Month, 12-Month, 13-Month, 14-Month, 15-Month Pet Policy: Breed Restriction The Hunt Club is a pet-friendly apartment community. We welcome cats and dogs (breed restrictions apply). Exotic pets are approved on a case by case basis. You may have two pets per apartment. There is a monthly pet rent of $35 for 1 pet and $50 for 2 pets. There is also a one-time, non-refundable fee of $350 for 1 pet and $500 for 2 pets.
